title: Prism Cascade — Match-3 Arcade
description: A gem-swapping match-3 arcade with combo cascades, special gems, three game modes, and a real scoreboard worth bragging about.
concept: An 8x8 match-3 board rendered on canvas with six glowing gem shapes. Matching 4 in a row spawns a line-clearing gem, matching 5 spawns a color bomb. Three modes give it real replay value: Rush is a 60-second score attack, Zen is an endless chill mode that tracks your best combo, and Levels is a 10-stage gauntlet with move limits and star ratings. Snapshot export and shareable seed links let players brag about a board or replay a friend's exact game.
features: Three distinct modes: Rush (timed), Zen (endless), Levels (10 move-limited goal stages with star ratings)
Cascading combo chains with score multipliers and special gems (row/column clear, color bomb)
Save/export: PNG snapshot download of the board + score, and a shareable seeded URL to replay the same board
Persistent state: high scores, best combo, and per-level star progress saved to localStorage
tech: Pointer Events (tap-tap + drag swap, mouse + touch)

interaction.mouse: Click a gem, then click an adjacent gem to swap; matching 3+ clears them
interaction.click: Tap mode tabs to switch Rush / Zen / Levels; tap level tiles to jump to a stage
interaction.touch: Tap-tap to select and swap gems; fully touch-friendly on mobile
